name: Broccoli and Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1 cup lightly toasted, coarsely chopped peanuts
recipeInstructions:
--Spicy Peanut Sauce--
1. In a small bowl, combine the peanut butter and hot water until smooth.
2. Whisk in the remaining ingredients: rice or cider vinegar, blackstrap molasses, and cayenne to taste.
--Recipe Instructions--
1. Cut the tofu into 1-inch cubes and place them in a medium-sized saucepan. Cover with water and bring to a boil. Lower the heat and simmer for about 10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. Trim and discard tough ends of broccoli stems. Remove tough skins from stalks using a sharp pairing knife or vegetable peeler. Cut stalks diagonally into thin slices. Coarsely chop florets.
3. Heat oil in a large wok or skillet. After about 1 minute, add onion and cook over high heat for 2 minutes.
4. Add broccoli, ginger, garlic, and salt. Stir-fry over high heat for about 5 minutes, until broccoli is bright green and just tender. Stir in tofu and scallions; cook a few more minutes.
5. Add the spicy peanut sauce, stirring until everything is well coated. Serve immediately over rice, topped with lightly toasted, coarsely chopped peanuts if desired.
